creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
Commit b63fed6c added sysutils/py-TA-Lib, described as a new port.  However, the distfile is exactly the same as the existing sysutils/py-ta-lib (note the difference in case).  The new port should IMHO be removed in favor of the old one.

https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/b63fed6cf6b8338e6fa2df9c864b67d5b3504351
